string.text: That body you claimed, mind if I buy it off you?
I might have a kill to spare. For the right price.
Pleasure doing business. It's all yours.
Haven't got any fresh kills to sell, stalker. Try me another time.
Ha! You think I keep a body lying around just for you, gopnik? Nothing here.
No salvage to log right now, stalker. Move along.
Nothing on me, druzhe. The Zone's been quiet lately.
No claims on record at the moment. Check back later.
Got nothing for you. When I do, you'll pay full price.
No bodies to move right now, civilian. Keep walking.
No specimens to spare at present, I'm afraid.
The Monolith has granted me nothing to trade. Go.
Hah! No meat for you today, freak. Maybe I go make some, eh?
Sin holds no debts for you to claim now. Walk on.
Nothing logged to my unit. Inquire another time.
I've got nothing to sell you right now.
